name: Mitosis Time-Lapse Quantification
description: You are a cell biologist analyzing cell division dynamics from a time-lapse fluorescence experiment. Using the 'Mitosis (5D stack)' sample in Fiji, analyze the multi-dimensional hyperstack to track mitotic events across all available time frames. For each time point, generate a maximum-intensity Z-projection from the channel that best highlights mitotic events. Perform thresholding to identify mitotic cells or nuclei, then calculate the object count and total fluorescent area for each projected time frame. Save a CSV containing the time frame index, object count, and total thresholded area to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/mitosis_timeseries.csv. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.

metadata.image_source: Fiji built-in sample (File > Open Samples > Mitosis (5D stack))
